#nullable enable

using System;
using System.CodeDom.Compiler;
using System.Linq;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;

namespace TestApp.Mappers;

/// <summary>
/// Source generated mapper from <see cref="global::TestApp.Models.Source"/> to <see cref="global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord"/>.
/// </summary>
partial class RecordMapper
    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Source, global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Source? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord
        {
            Id = source.Id,
            Name = source.Name,
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Source source, global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord destination)
    {
        throw new NotSupportedException("Map to existing destination is not supported because all destination properties are read-only.");
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Source, global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord
        {
            Id = src.Id,
            Name = src.Name,
        };

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.DestRecord> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Source> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }

}
